creator: bcr@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Follow Daniel Gerzos suggestion of addressing this issue upstream when 
the next import is going to happen. I've checked the Opensolaris 
documentation at http://docs.sun.com/app/docs/doc/819-2240/zfs-1m which 
does not contain this error anymore. Therefore, close this PR and wait 
for the next import to resolve this issue.
